title: GoldRush Kit Transaction Feed
description: Drop-in React component rendering a paginated, decoded transaction activity feed for any wallet using WalletActivityListView — shows decoded event names, values, and timestamps.
useCase: Add a paginated transaction activity feed to a wallet app — shows decoded event labels, values, and chain info with zero custom UI code required.

keyParams.address: 0x wallet address to show transactions for
keyParams.chain_names: Array of chain names to include in the feed
